articles.title: Chainlink Wealth Gap Widens as Top 1% Own Over 80% of LINK
articles.description: The news is good for LINK holders, however, not necessarily on the wealth equality scale. The top 1% of holders now own over 80% of the supply, According to Glassnode. The on-chain market intelligence firm explains: “LINK Percent Balance of Top 1% Addresses just reached a 3-year high of 81.737%. Previous 3-year high of 81.658% … Continued

articles.title: VeChain (VET) Rebounds After Correction from All-Time High
articles.description: While a short-term rejection could occur, VeChain is expected to eventually resume its upward movement toward new all-time highs. VeChain Scores New All-Time High The weekly chart shows that VET has finally moved above the $0.022 area, which had been acting as resistance since July 2020. On Jan. 6, VET reached a new … Continued

Ethereum Layer 2 Optimism Increasing with Mainnet Soft Launch
articles.description: Following a year of development, Layer-2 Ethereum solutions provider Optimism has soft-launched on the mainnet over the weekend. In its latest blog post, the Optimism team laid out the particulars of the launch and detailed the battle testing that still needs to be carried out on the network.
